error_signature: only the first file was extracted
title: Extract Node only processes the first file in a loop
symptom: When using the Extract Node in a loop, only the first file from an array is extracted, and subsequent files are ignored.
applies_when: Processing multiple files in a loop
not_this_if: Only one file is being processed
root_cause: The Extract Node does not automatically track which files have already been processed in a loop. Without additional instructions, it continues to reference the first file, leading to only that file being extracted.
fix_steps: Add a Code Node after the Extract Node
Implement logic in the Code Node to update the list of files to be extracted
Ensure the loop references the updated list of files
agent_instruction: Add a Code Node to update the list of files after each extraction in the loop.
